backend_policy: Python-only for repository-generated quantitative figures unless the manuscript team explicitly elects R before figure production.

journal_export_contract.font_policy: Arial/Helvetica preferred with DejaVu Sans fallback; SVG text remains editable and PDF uses TrueType fonts.
journal_export_contract.error_bar_policy: Show mean with SEM when replicate-level data are available; otherwise mark error bars as not estimable in source data and QA.
journal_export_contract.image_integrity_policy: No image manipulation beyond deterministic plotting from source CSV files.

figures.core_conclusion: The final analysis sample and scene design are traceable by participant group, recruitment batch, WWR, complexity, and presentation order.
figures.review_risk: Must not hide low-experience supplementation or imbalance; report before/after counts explicitly.
figures.statistics_note: Counts and percentages; no inferential test is implied.
figures.image_integrity_note: All bars are direct counts from sample/design QC CSV files.

figures.core_conclusion: WWR and visual complexity effects on S1-S5 are evaluated as item-level outcomes rather than an unvalidated composite scale.
figures.review_risk: Avoid claiming a definitive WWR optimum from three levels; use planned-contrast language.
figures.statistics_note: Mean with SEM when group-level variability is available; planned contrast is exploratory trend evidence.
figures.image_integrity_note: No smoothing or interpolation beyond connecting observed WWR levels.

figures.core_conclusion: AOI-based eye metrics are interpretable only when AOI area, visit rate, and sample coverage are reported.
figures.review_risk: AOI validity must be shown before interpreting gaze allocation differences.
figures.statistics_note: AOI means, sample coverage, and missing-file counts.
figures.image_integrity_note: AOI geometry values are plotted directly from validation output.

figures.core_conclusion: EEG interpretations are bounded by synchronization QC and convergence with eye-tracking and questionnaire evidence.
figures.review_risk: Do not present EEG-only cognitive-load claims unless multimodal convergence and alignment QC support them.
figures.statistics_note: Scene-level EEG-eye scatter, duration-delta summary, and categorical claim-support score.
figures.image_integrity_note: No temporal interpolation is plotted; time-bin and alignment tables are retained as source data.

figures.core_conclusion: Gender, order/fatigue, recruitment batch, and nonlinear WWR sensitivity analyses determine how strongly each manuscript claim can be stated.
figures.review_risk: Claim strength must be downgraded when sensitivity checks or modality convergence are incomplete.
figures.statistics_note: Diagnostic correlations, WWR45 peak index, and categorical claim-strength scores.
figures.image_integrity_note: Claim scores are categorical encodings for visual audit only; manuscript wording uses the original labels.
